title: Dow Jones Has Best Month Since 1976: Here Are October's Top 5 Dow Performers
text: The Dow Jones Industrial Average surged 13.95% in October, the best month since 1976. Caterpillar led the 5 top Dow performers for the month.

title: Honeywell Is Knocking The Ball Out Of The Park
text: Pardon the baseball analogy, but boy has Honeywell delivered time and time again over the years. The company has avoided many of the missteps in recent years that have plagued companies like General Electric or Boeing.

title: Honeywell's (HON) Q3 Earnings Beat, 2022 EPS View Upbeat
text: Honeywell's (HON) Q3 results benefit from growth in Honeywell Building Technologies, Performance Materials and Technologies and Aerospace units. The company improves its 2022 earnings guidance.

title: Honeywell International, Inc. (HON) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Honeywell International, Inc. (NASDAQ:HON ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Sean Meakim - VP, IR Darius Adamczyk - Chairman & CEO Vimal Kapur - COO & President Gregory Lewis - SVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Charles Tusa - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Jeffrey Sprague - Vertical Research Partners Julian Mitchell - Barclays Bank Scott Davis - Melius Research Sheila Kahyaoglu - Jefferies Andrew Obin - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Deane Dray - RBC Capital Markets Joshua Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Joseph Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Group Nicole DeBlase - Deutsche Bank Operator Thank you for standing by, and welcome to the Honeywell Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions].

title: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.17% and 1.37%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Honeywell stock heads higher after earnings as company boosts profit outlook
text: Shares of Honeywell International Inc. HON, +0.33% were up about 1% in premarket trading Thursday after the conglomerate housing aerospace, materials, and other businesses raised its full-year profit forecast and highlighted that its backlog gives "confidence" in the demand roadmap despite challenging economic conditions. The company reported net income of $1.55 billion, or $2.28 a share, compared with $1.26 billion, or $1.80 a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: HONEYWELL DELIVERS STRONG THIRD QUARTER RESULTS AND BEATS GUIDANCE ON SEGMENT MARGIN AND EARNINGS; RAISES FULL YEAR OUTLOOK
text: Operating Margin up 90 Basis Points to 19.5%; Segment Margin1 up 60 Basis Points to 21.8%, Exceeding High End of Guidance Range by 60 bps Earnings Per Share of $2.28, Adjusted EPS1 of $2.25, Exceeding High End of Guidance Range by 5 Cents Operating Cash Flow up 86% to $2.1 Billion; Free Cash Flow1 up 108% to $1.9 Billion $1.2 Billion of Capital Deployed to Share Repurchases, Dividends, and Capital Expenditures Company Raises Midpoint of Organic Sales Growth, Segment Margin,2 and Adjusted EPS Guidance2,3; Reaffirms Full-Year Free Cash Flow Guidance CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Oct. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced results for the third quarter, which met or exceeded the company's guidance.

title: Watch Honeywell's Earnings for Clues About Economic Health
text: The conglomerate's businesses touch nearly every area of the economy.

title: What To Expect From Honeywell Stock After It Reports Q3 Earnings?
text: Looking back at Q2 2022, Honeywell reported a 2% y-o-y rise in sales to $9.0 billion, led by a mid-to-high single-digit rise in Aerospace, Building Technologies, and Performance Materials & Technologies sales, partly offset by lower Safety & Industrial solutions revenue.

title: Honeywell survey reveals strong corporate efforts to cut energy waste, but cloudier outlook for coming sustainability efforts
text: Companies are setting aside more budget for energy and environmental sustainability as investors, consumers and boards will only increase their expectations for these efforts. That's just one of the findings of an innaugural survey from Honeywell — which will be shaped into a comparable quarterly index — out this week.

title: HONEYWELL LAUNCHES ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY INDEX SHOWING SUSTAINABILITY LEADERS' SENTIMENT ON PAST PROGRESS AND FUTURE EXPECTATIONS TOWARDS CORPORATE ENVIRONMENTAL GOALS
text: First multi-industry and multi-regional index points to corporate confidence about past progress, but less optimism about short- and long-term future goals Nearly nine out of ten organizations are planning to increase sustainability budgets for the coming twelve months Respondents reveal near-term climate efforts revolve around process and behavioral changes across the organization, with less emphasis on technological integrations CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Oct. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON), a global leader in energy and climate transition solutions, today announced the launch of its Environmental Sustainability Index.

title: Dow Jones Bear Market: 3 No-Brainer Stocks for Market Growth
text: These Dow stocks should prosper when the current bear market ends.

title: 7 Battery Stocks to Buy and Hold for Big-Time Gains
text: As we enter into the era of renewable energy sources like solar and wind power, battery companies are one of the fastest-growing sectors. Based on research from Precedence Research, the global electric vehicle (EV) battery market size is set to be worth $559.87 billion in 2030 and growing fast at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 32% from 2022 to 2030.

title: Honeywell forecasts increase in private jet deliveries over next decade
text: Honeywell International Inc on Sunday lifted its outlook for business jet deliveries, as the COVID-19 pandemic brought in a wave of first-time users and buyers in the private flying market.

title: HONEYWELL FORECAST SHOWS STRONG GROWTH FOR BUSINESS AVIATION AS PURCHASE PLANS INCREASE SHARPLY
text: 31st annual Global Business Aviation Outlook projects 8,500 new business jet deliveries valued at $274 billion over the next decade. Projected business jet deliveries, expenditures over the next decade surge 15% from last year's survey.

title: Hyundai's air taxi unit picks Honeywell as avionics supplier
text: Hyundai Motor Co's air taxi unit has picked aerospace supplier Honeywell International Inc to develop avionics systems for its eVTOL (electric vertical take-off and landing) aircraft, the companies said, ahead of an announcement next week.

title: Honeywell (HON) Offers Mobile Devices to Tractor Supply
text: Honeywell (HON) helps Tractor Supply streamline its operations and increase productivity by providing the latter with its CT40XP mobile computer and cloud-based software.

title: HONEYWELL AND ACCELERATOR FOR AMERICA COLLABORATE TO PROMOTE SMART CITY GROWTH IN FIVE U.S. CITIES
text: The Honeywell Smart City Accelerator Program will help expand smart city growth in selected cities to support safer, more efficient, resilient and equitable communities ATLANTA , Oct. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) and Accelerator for America today announced the launch of the Honeywell Smart City Accelerator Program to help cities strategically plan their futures and build capacity to fund transformational initiatives. Honeywell is engaging with five U.S. cities to provide in-kind support to accelerate progress on their smart city strategic planning.

title: Honeywell Can Weather This Economic Slowdown
text: Honeywell is trying to break out of an extended period of slow growth. Management is focused on building out higher-margin business lines.

title: Honeywell (HON) Introduces Ethanol-to-Jet Fuel Technology
text: Honeywell's (HON) new ethanol-to-jet fuel technology, which can substantially reduce greenhouse gas emissions, is aimed at meeting the growing demand for SAF.

title: HONEYWELL TECHNOLOGY PROVIDES TRACTOR SUPPLY WITH INDUSTRY-LEADING END-TO-END TEAM MEMBER AND CUSTOMER EXPERIENCES
text: Rural Lifestyle Retailer Taps Honeywell for Its Mobile Computers and Software to Gain an Edge with Team Members and Customers In-store Retail Solutions Deployed to Create Task Efficiencies Across Tractor Supply's 2,000 Plus Stores CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Oct. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Honeywell (Nasdaq: HON) announced today that Tractor Supply Company (Nasdaq: TSCO), the largest rural lifestyle retailer in the United States, has deployed Honeywell technology to streamline operations for their Team Members and offer customers a convenient, end-to-end omnichannel experience.

title: Honeywell has a mile-high use for the leftover ethanol as EVs replace gas cars
text: A future with fewer gas-powered cars and SUVs and a push for cleaning up greenhouse gas emissions from all modes of transportation is behind a fresh use for ethanol — converting this plant-based fossil-fuel alternative to create sustainable aviation fuel (SAF).

title: HONEYWELL REVOLUTIONIZES ETHANOL-TO-JET FUEL TECHNOLOGY TO MEET RISING DEMAND FOR SUSTAINABLE AVIATION FUEL
text: Honeywell's new solution represents critical development in global drive to meet 2030 sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) mandates Provides a cost-effective path for producing lower greenhouse gas emission (GHG) jet fuel from ethanol Modular design lowers capital costs and speeds time to first production CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Oct. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced a new, innovative ethanol-to-jet fuel (ETJ) processing technology that allows producers to convert corn-based, cellulosic, or sugar-based ethanol into sustainable aviation fuel (SAF).

title: 7 Value Stocks That Are Too Cheap to Ignore
text: With the global markets seeming poised to suffer a significant downturn, investors should prepare for this possibility by targeting cheap value stocks to buy. According to Investopedia.com, value-based investments refer to securities that trade at a price lower than the fundamentals imply.

title: Labor Shortage Spurs Drive To Automate Warehouses
text: Amazon is leading the automation drive as e-commerce customers demand faster deliveries. The post Labor Shortage Spurs Drive To Automate Warehouses appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: HONEYWELL SELECTED BY MANGATA NETWORKS TO PROVIDE CONTROL SYSTEMS FOR NEW SATELLITE CONSTELLATIONS
text: Honeywell system enables seamless connectivity for users of Mangata's 5G network PHOENIX , Oct. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that Mangata Networks, a satellite telecommunications company, selected Honeywell's space integrated attitude control system (IACS) in support of its new constellations comprising 32 satellites. Mangata's new highly elliptical orbit (HEO) and medium Earth orbit (MEO) satellite constellations provide communications and weather monitoring in areas that typically lack in quality internet connectivity.
